testcase.name: test_get_hotel_availability_for_march_2026

error.message: failed on setup with "pytest.PytestRemovedIn9Warning: '' requested an async fixture 'motor_client', with no plugin or hook that handled it. This is usually an error, as pytest does not natively support it. This will turn into an error in pytest 9. See: https://docs.pytest.org/en/stable/deprecations.html#sync-test-depending-on-async-fixture"

testcase.name: test_hotels_have_sheet_sync_info
